summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PredictPod - Probability Intelligence Terminal. All 24 backend tests pass. Frontend UI loads correctly with all required features: Dashboard with Market/Fair/Edge/Signal columns, Game Detail with 3 chart tabs (Probability, Edge, Volatility), Portfolio page with balance/exposure/risk, Paper Trading workflow.

minor.issue: Edge shows +0.0% for all scheduled games. This is expected behavior per main agent notes - fair prob equals market prob for pre-game scheduled status.

issues: Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts still render correctly but warnings appear when switching tabs. This is a minor Recharts ResponsiveContainer issue during tab transitions.

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer throws console warnings during chart tab transitions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight props or checking visibility before rendering
WebSocket connection momentarily drops during navigation between pages (reconnects automatically) - normal behavior but could be optimized
seed_data_creation: None - uses live ESPN NBA data via ESPN adapter
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend APIs return proper data with dynamic probability engine (not static 50%), composite signal scores (46-49 range for scheduled games), portfolio-aware actions (ENTER_LONG/SHORT, EXIT, TRIM, COVER, WAIT). Charts render via Recharts with Probability (LineChart), Edge (AreaChart), Volatility (BarChart). Kalshi market data is MOCKED via MockKalshiAdapter for paper trading. WebSocket provides real-time updates every 3-5 seconds.

game_detail.probability_chart: LineChart with Market Prob and Fair Prob lines
game_detail.edge_chart: AreaChart with gradient and reference lines at +/-5%
game_detail.empty_data_handling: Charts display 'No data available' message gracefully

mocked_apis_list: backend/adapters/kalshi/ - MockKalshiAdapter for Kalshi market data
